init_eqs_str: a['q1'] = 0; a['q2'] = 0; a['dec'] = 0; a['mybass'] = 0; a['mytreb'] = 0; a['myside'] = 0; a['mtime'] = 0;
frame_eqs_str: a['dec']=pow(0.9, div(30,a['fps'])); a['mybass']=((a['mybass']*a['dec'])+((1-a['dec'])*a['bass'])); a['mytreb']=((a['mytreb']*a['dec'])+((1-a['dec'])*a['treb'])); a['myside']=Math.max(a['mytreb'], a['mybass']); a['q1']=a['myside']; a['mtime']=(a['mtime']+((Math.max(1, div(30,a['fps']))*a['myside'])*0.01)); a['q2']=a['mtime']; a['sy']=((a['sy']-(0.005*a['myside']))+0.01); a['ob_r']=(a['ob_r']+(0.002*Math.sin((a['mtime']*1.12)))); a['ob_g']=(a['ob_g']+(0.002*Math.sin((a['mtime']*1.21)))); a['ob_b']=(a['ob_b']+(0.002*Math.sin((a['mtime']*1.3))));
